pokemon:flutter-mane.name: Flutter Mane
pokemon:flutter-mane.summary: This Pokémon has characteristics similar to those of Flutter Mane, a creature mentioned in a certain book.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This Pokémon has characteristics similar to those of Flutter Mane, a creature mentioned in a certain book.
It has similar features to a ghostly pterosaur that was covered in a paranormal magazine, but the two have little else in common.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This Pokémon has characteristics similar to those of Flutter Mane, a creature mentioned in a certain book.
